summary: Completed frontend testing of Global Access shipping website with focus on Supabase Realtime features. Successfully tested initial login flow and confirmed realtime indicator functionality, but encountered critical session persistence issues that prevent comprehensive testing of core features.

authentication_issues.issue: Critical session persistence failure - users get logged out immediately when navigating between pages or performing actions
authentication_issues.symptoms: After successful login, any navigation or page interaction causes session to be lost and user is redirected to landing page

navigation_issues.issue: Create Shipment navigation from sidebar does not work - stays on dashboard
Direct URL access to /dashboard/shipments/new redirects to login page even when authenticated

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test realtime features due to session persistence blocking access to shipment creation and updates

passed_tests: Frontend loading and landing page display
User login flow with test credentials (realtime1774376956@test.com)
Dashboard initial loading with user profile display
Realtime indicator (Live badge) display on dashboard header
Dashboard stats cards rendering (Total, In Transit, Delivered, Pending)
Sidebar navigation structure and user profile section
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix session persistence issue in AuthContext and Supabase session management. Users are getting logged out immediately after any navigation or interaction post-login. This blocks testing of all core features including shipment creation, status updates, and realtime functionality. The issue appears to be the same as reported in iteration_4 but remains unresolved.
